segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I need to buy a birthday present for my friend who loves cooking. Do you have any ideas? How about a high quality set of kitchen knives? That's a good idea, but I think she has a good set of knives already. She cooks a lot, so she has all the basic equipment. Hmm, maybe you should stop by the kitchenware store downtown and ask their advice. I bet they have a lot of fun stuff for people who already have a well stocked kitchen.
